reason:
Agent failed to retrieve GitHub username due to GitHub proxy connection error (502 "Failed to fetch access token")
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub proxy is returning a 502 error when attempting to fetch the access token. The agent made multiple retry attempts (with status code, after brief wait, after longer wait) but all failed with the same error. The agent could not complete the task of retrieving and reporting the GitHub username.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Find and click "QA-20260505-191204-lyyh" agent — Agent opened successfully
Verify agent status — Status showed "idle" (requirement met: "running" or "idle")
Send message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message sent successfully, agent transitioned to "working" status
Agent requested GitHub account access — Card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access
Click "Allow Access" button to grant GitHub permissions — GitHub access was granted, agent continued working
Agent executed multiple API calls to GitHub — Multiple "Fetch authenticated GitHub user", "Retry with status code", "Retry after brief wait", and "Retry after longer wait" bash commands were executed
Agent approved each API request (GET /user) — Multiple "Allow Once" permissions were granted for the GitHub API calls

Agent completed after 4m 16s with error response — Agent returned error message: "The GitHub proxy is returning a 502 error ("Failed to fetch access token") on every attempt — the connection appears to be broken on the platform side." This is NOT a GitHub username, so the test requirement was not met.
bugs: GitHub proxy is returning a 502 error when attempting to fetch the access token. The agent made multiple retry attempts (with status code, after brief wait, after longer wait) but all failed with the same error. The agent could not complete the task of retrieving and reporting the GitHub username.
